content:
Should I invest in a ULIP or a mutual fund? This is one of the most frequent questions I get from young professionals. My answer: it depends on what you actually need.

ULIP advantages: Tax-free maturity under Section 10(10D) when annual premium is below Rs 2.5 lakh. This is a significant advantage over equity mutual funds where long-term capital gains above Rs 1 lakh are taxed at 12.5%. ULIPs provide life cover in a single product. Post-2010 ULIPs have much lower charges than their predecessors.

Mutual Fund advantages: Lower expense ratios (0.5 to 1.5% for index funds vs 2 to 2.5% for ULIPs in early years). No lock-in beyond 3 years versus the 5-year minimum lock-in for ULIPs. Wider fund selection across thousands of schemes.

My practical recommendation: Buy a separate term insurance plan for maximum protection at minimum cost. Then invest in mutual fund SIPs for wealth creation. This combination almost always beats a ULIP on pure numbers. However, if you are in the 30% tax bracket and want a discipline-enforced 10-plus year lock-in with tax-free maturity, a good ULIP can make sense as part of your portfolio.

Never buy a ULIP primarily for insurance. Never buy a mutual fund and skip life cover. Call me at 9415313434 to evaluate which combination suits your income and goals.

Use our free [Premium Calculator](/calculators/premium) to calculate your own numbers.
contentHi:
ULIP के फायदे: सेक्शन 10(10D) के तहत टैक्स-फ्री मैच्योरिटी। इक्विटी MF पर 12.5% LTCG से बचत।

म्यूचुअल फंड के फायदे: कम एक्सपेंस रेशियो (0.5-1.5%)। 3 वर्ष बाद कोई लॉक-इन नहीं।

मेरी सलाह: टर्म प्लान + म्यूचुअल फंड SIP — यह संयोजन अधिकतर ULIP से बेहतर। लेकिन 30% टैक्स ब्रैकेट में लंबी अवधि के लिए अच्छा ULIP हो सकता है। 9415313434 पर कॉल करें।
